name: mythril-agent-skills
description: Reusable skills for AI coding assistants — code review, Git/GitHub, Jira, Confluence, Figma, Glean, Excel, ImageMagick, FFmpeg, and more

plugins.name: all-skills
plugins.description: All-in-one bundle: code review, Git/GitHub, Jira, Confluence, Figma, Glean, Excel, PDF, Markdown-to-PDF, ImageMagick, FFmpeg, blog writer, and skill creator

plugins.name: skill-creator
plugins.description: Create and improve skills/prompts for any AI platform — drafting, evaluation, benchmarking, description optimization

plugins.name: code-review-staged
plugins.description: Context-aware code review for git staged changes with auto-generated commit messages

plugins.name: branch-diff-review
plugins.description: Context-aware code review for local branch differences — pure git, no platform API required

plugins.name: github-code-review-pr
plugins.description: Comprehensive Pull Request code review via GitHub CLI with deep repo context

plugins.name: git-repo-reader
plugins.description: Clone, cache, and read any git repository for code exploration and analysis

plugins.name: gh-operations
plugins.description: GitHub CLI operations for issues, PRs, status checks, and comments

plugins.name: jira
plugins.description: Jira REST API integration for issues, sprints, boards, and workflows

plugins.name: confluence
plugins.description: Confluence REST API integration for pages, spaces, comments, and labels

plugins.name: figma
plugins.description: Extract Figma design specs (layout, colors, typography, components) for implementation

plugins.name: glean
plugins.description: Glean CLI integration — search company knowledge, chat with Glean AI, manage agents, documents, shortcuts

plugins.name: excel
plugins.description: Read, write, search, and manipulate Excel workbooks (.xlsx) via openpyxl

plugins.name: pdf
plugins.description: Read, extract, and manipulate PDF files — text, tables, metadata, images, merge, split, rotate

plugins.name: md-to-pdf
plugins.description: Convert Markdown files to PDF with TOC, custom CSS, paper size, and metadata

plugins.name: imagemagick
plugins.description: Image processing via ImageMagick CLI — resize, convert, crop, watermark, batch process

plugins.name: ffmpeg
plugins.description: Video and audio processing via FFmpeg CLI — transcode, trim, merge, compress, convert formats

plugins.name: blog-writer
plugins.description: Write, refine, and adapt blog posts with a tech-first focus — asks language first, supports technical and non-technical topics
